title: anisotome carnosula
intro: Anisotome carnosula, also known as New Zealand aniseed, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand and Australia, belonging to the carrot family Apium. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory ailments. The health benefits of Anisotome carnosula include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues. Aniseed tea, a herbal preparation made from the plant's leaves and stems, is often used to aid in digestion and relieve cold and flu symptoms.
